name: reconcile-spec
description: Reconcile an active spec package before resumed implementation.

arguments.name: spec_id
arguments.description: Spec package ID or path, for example 004-spec-management-mcp.

arguments.name: docs_root
arguments.description: Documentation root to scan when spec_id is not a path.

instructions: Use the spec-lifecycle-manager skill as the authoritative workflow guide.
Read the listed resources or equivalent CLI outputs before making a recommendation.
Separate observed facts, inferred diagnosis, and recommended action.
Report unresolved decisions, stale evidence, missing durable docs, and old-format migration needs.
client_support_recovery: If MCP tools are unavailable, ask naturally to reconcile the spec using the spec-lifecycle-manager skill plus spec_runtime.py lint and next-task.
